**What this does**
A short description of the change.

**Why**
The motivation / linked issue (`Closes #...`).

**Checklist**
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (added a test for engine behavior changes)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or justified in the description)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or options changed
